creator: freebsd-ports@dan.me.uk
text:
Created attachment 201367
Update cacti to 1.2.1

Update cacti to 1.2.1 (lots of bugfixes that were introduced in 1.2.0 are fixed)

Committer: please ignore gettext warnings - cacti has internal gettext support.

Poudriere testport logs for 11.2/amd64 + i386 at:

https://poudriere.dan.tm/poudriere/data/latest-per-pkg/cacti/1.2.1/

and for 12.0/amd64 + i386 at:

https://poudriere2.dan.tm/poudriere/data/latest-per-pkg/cacti/1.2.1/
